scripts.build: curl -sL https://github.com/flutter/flutter/archive/refs/tags/3.19.3.tar.gz | tar xz && PATH="$PATH:$(pwd)/flutter-3.19.3/bin" && flutter config --no-analytics && flutter pub global activate peanut && cd frontend && flutter pub get && flutter build web --release --dart-define=API_BASE_URL=https://conceptra-api.onrender.com/api/v1
